name: Beaded Ceramic Handled Vase Ivory - Threshold™
description:
Add a timeless touch to your decor with this Beaded Ceramic Handled Vase from Threshold™. Made of ceramic, this beaded vase is designed in an ivory hue and boasts a ribbed pattern on the body and two side handles on the neck. This watertight vase works as a solo accent and can also be used to hold cut flowers or faux stems

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
